verified_claim: Stronghold documents a central playfield, a named Castle Management Panel, and separate quick views for objectives and goods. Its siege mode separates pure combat from community-management modes.
applicability: World-first composition and one continuously discoverable objective are universal; Stronghold's castle/scribe framing is title-specific.
battle_screen_implication: Keep the tactical field central. Make the current objective, progress, and loss condition persist at the edge; keep inventory, lore, and non-combat systems transient. Use original iron-standard, parchment-chronicle, and siege-landmark framing rather than Stronghold art.
anti_pattern: A permanent resource/build queue or a full-page illustrated dashboard in resource-free battle mode.
acceptance_criterion: A first-glance Stage 1 screen shows the tactical field, current objective, its progress, and the next legal command without opening a brief.
